title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on language, identity and communication.

questions.question: Do you think the dominance of English as a global language is a positive development, or does it threaten linguistic diversity?
How important is it for a country to protect and promote its minority languages, and what can governments do to support this?

script.text: Do you think the dominance of English as a global language is a positive development, or does it threaten linguistic diversity?
How important is it for a country to protect and promote its minority languages, and what can governments do to support this?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
